author: Ameen Hassan
summary: The user asked about their latest grant submission. The assistant searched the AgentOS memory system using context_search_memories (query: 'grant submitted') and context_get_project_memory (project: 'rfp-project'), both of which returned no results. A follow-up search for OERAC, BHA, Uplift, Bridge, and Pathway terms also returned zero results. The assistant concluded that no grant submission records have been captured in prior sessions and was preparing to summarize what was known from the user's profile about grants in development.
problems: No grant submission records exist in the AgentOS memory system
No memory file exists for the 'rfp-project' project
User requested information about their latest submitted grant but memory system has no capture of submission events
approaches: Searched context_search_memories with query 'OERAC BHA Uplift Bridge Pathway grant'
results: context_get_project_memory returned error: no memory file for project 'rfp-project'
context_search_memories returned 0 results for grant organization names
No grant submission events have been captured in AgentOS memory across any prior session
open_questions: Which specific grant did the user most recently submit, and when?
Has any grant (Uplift OERAC, Bridge CEMIG, PTR MAT, Rooted Wellness 245G) actually been submitted or are all still in development?
Should grant submission events be explicitly captured in AgentOS project memory going forward?
